dialog: Good morning. Lady Rate sent me to you... for the 'rigidity' problem?
In flesh and equations. Without me your network has its hands tied and must always pass through the origin. I am the Bias: I give you freedom of movement.
So I can move to better fit the points?
Exactly. Go to the Simulator and move your Bias value until the line passes precisely through the middle of the points, then come back here.
